test_commands.all_tests: npm run lint && npm run build

dependencies.relationship: The Vite dev proxy (configured in task group 6) forwards /healthz and /readyz to the Go backend defined by server_foundation. The proxy is configured in this spec but depends on server_foundation for the backend endpoint definitions.

task_groups.title: Initialize web/ project: environment files, gitignore, and package.json

subtasks.title: Create web/.nvmrc pinning Node.js 22 LTS
details: Create `web/.nvmrc` with content exactly `22` (single line, no extra whitespace).
Confirm no `.nvmrc` is created at the repository root by this spec.

subtasks.title: Add web/dist/ and web/node_modules/ to root .gitignore
details: Append `web/dist/` and `web/node_modules/` to the root `.gitignore` file (not `web/.gitignore`).
Do not create a `web/.gitignore` file.
Verify with `git check-ignore web/dist/ web/node_modules/` both return ignored.

subtasks.title: Create web/package.json with all runtime and dev dependencies
details: Create `web/package.json` with `name`, `version`, `private: true`.
Add runtime deps with `^` ranges: `react`, `react-dom`, `react-router-dom`, `@tanstack/react-query`.

Add dev deps with `^` ranges: `typescript`, `vite`, `@vitejs/plugin-react`, `tailwindcss`, `postcss`, `autoprefixer`, `eslint` (v9+), `@typescript-eslint/eslint-plugin`, `@typescript-eslint/parser`, `eslint-plugin-react`, `eslint-plugin-react-hooks`.
Define scripts: `dev`: `vite`, `build`: `tsc && vite build`, `lint`: `eslint . && tsc --noEmit`.
Run `npm install` to generate `package-lock.json`; commit both files.

subtasks.title: Commit package-lock.json lockfile
details: After `npm install`, commit `web/package-lock.json` to the repository.
Verify `npm ci` in `web/` exits with code 0 on a fresh install.
Ensure lockfile is consistent with `package.json` — no manual edits to lockfile.

checks: TS-06-1 passes: `web/.nvmrc` contains '22'.
TS-06-4 passes: `git check-ignore web/dist/ web/node_modules/` both exit 0.
TS-06-5 passes: `web/.gitignore` does not exist.
TS-06-2 passes: `npm ci` in `web/` exits 0.
TS-06-3 passes: all version strings in `package.json` start with '^'.
TS-06-12, TS-06-13, TS-06-14 pass: all required deps and scripts are present.

task_groups.title: Configure TypeScript, ESLint, Tailwind, and PostCSS

subtasks.title: Create tsconfig.json and tsconfig.node.json
details: Create `web/tsconfig.json` with: `strict: true`, `noUncheckedIndexedAccess: true`, `moduleResolution: bundler`, `target: ES2022`, `lib: [ES2022, DOM, DOM.Iterable]`, `jsx: react-jsx`, `module: ESNext`, `skipLibCheck: true`, `noEmit: true`, `baseUrl: .`, `paths: { '@/*': ['./src/*'] }`; include `src` glob.
Create `web/tsconfig.node.json` with: `composite: true`, `skipLibCheck: true`, `module: ESNext`, `moduleResolution: bundler`, `allowSyntheticDefaultImports: true`, `include: ['vite.config.ts']`.
Reference `tsconfig.node.json` in the root `tsconfig.json` via `references` array if using project references.

subtasks.title: Create eslint.config.js with flat config format
details: Create `web/eslint.config.js` as an ESM module exporting an array of config objects (ESLint 9+ flat config format).
Configure `@typescript-eslint/parser` as the parser and `@typescript-eslint/eslint-plugin` rules.
Configure `eslint-plugin-react` and `eslint-plugin-react-hooks` rules.
Explicitly set `'react/react-in-jsx-scope': 'off'` to handle React 17+ JSX transform.
Ensure `npm run lint` (i.e., `eslint . && tsc --noEmit`) exits with code 0 on the scaffold.

subtasks.title: Create tailwind.config.ts, postcss.config.js, and src/globals.css
details: Create `web/tailwind.config.ts` with `content: ['./index.html', './src/**/*.{ts,tsx,js,jsx}']`, `darkMode: 'class'`, and theme extension with shadcn/ui CSS variable colour mappings (e.g., `background: 'hsl(var(--background))'`).
Create `web/postcss.config.js` configuring `tailwindcss` and `autoprefixer` plugins.

Create `web/src/globals.css` with `@tailwind base`, `@tailwind components`, `@tailwind utilities`, plus `:root` and `.dark` blocks containing shadcn/ui CSS variable declarations (`--background`, `--foreground`, `--primary`, etc.) as generated by `npx shadcn-ui init`.

checks: TS-06-15 passes: `tsconfig.json` has all required compiler options; `tsc --noEmit` exits 0.
TS-06-16 passes: `tsconfig.node.json` has all required options.
TS-06-22 through TS-06-27 pass: ESLint config is correct, `npm run lint` exits 0.
TS-06-28 passes: `globals.css` has Tailwind directives and CSS variable declarations.
TS-06-29 passes: `tailwind.config.ts` has correct content paths and `darkMode: 'class'`.
TS-06-30 passes: `postcss.config.js` references both plugins.
TS-06-E4: `noUncheckedIndexedAccess: true` is confirmed in `tsconfig.json`.

task_groups.title: Configure Vite, path alias, shadcn/ui init, and Button component

subtasks.title: Create vite.config.ts with path alias, dev proxy, and APP_VERSION define
details: Create `web/vite.config.ts` using `@vitejs/plugin-react`.
Configure `resolve.alias` mapping `'@'` to `path.resolve(__dirname, './src')`.
Configure `server.port: 5173` and `server.proxy` for `/api`, `/healthz`, `/readyz` — all targeting `http://localhost:8080` with `changeOrigin: true`, no `rewrite`.
Add `define: { __APP_VERSION__: JSON.stringify(process.env.npm_package_version) }`.
Reference `tsconfig.node.json` for Vite's own TypeScript resolution.

subtasks.title: Run npx shadcn-ui init and commit components.json and src/lib/utils.ts
details: Run `npx shadcn-ui init` in `web/` — select CSS variable style, confirm alias `@/` → `src/`, accept defaults.
Commit generated `web/components.json` (records style, theme, alias, component path config).
Commit generated `web/src/lib/utils.ts` which exports the `cn()` helper (clsx + tailwind-merge).
Do not delete or modify `src/lib/utils.ts` — it is a required file for all shadcn/ui component copies.

subtasks.title: Copy in shadcn/ui Button component via npx shadcn-ui add button
details: Run `npx shadcn-ui add button` in `web/` to copy `src/components/ui/button.tsx` into the source tree.
Commit `web/src/components/ui/button.tsx`.
Verify the Button component imports `cn` from `@/lib/utils` using the `@/` alias (not relative path).
Verify `npm run build` exits 0 with the Button component present.

checks: TS-06-20 passes: `vite.config.ts` has correct `resolve.alias` and `npm run build` exits 0.
TS-06-33 through TS-06-36 pass: port 5173 configured, all three proxy rules present with `changeOrigin: true`, no `rewrite`.
TS-06-45 passes: `define.__APP_VERSION__` uses `JSON.stringify(process.env.npm_package_version)`.
TS-06-10 passes: `web/components.json` exists and is valid JSON.
TS-06-11 passes: `web/src/lib/utils.ts` exports `cn`; `tsc --noEmit` exits 0.
TS-06-32 passes: `src/components/ui/button.tsx` exists; `npm run build` exits 0.
TS-06-E9 passes: no `rewrite` in proxy config.
TS-06-P4 passes: `components.json` is consistent with alias config.

task_groups.title: Create React entry point, App.tsx with routing and QueryClient, and vite-env.d.ts

subtasks.title: Create web/index.html Vite entry point
details: Create `web/index.html` at the Vite project root (NOT inside `src/`).

Include `
` as the React mount target.
Reference `src/main.tsx` via `<script type="module" src="/src/main.tsx"></script>`.
Include appropriate HTML boilerplate (doctype, charset, viewport meta tag, title `af-hub`).

subtasks.title: Create src/vite-env.d.ts with Vite client types and __APP_VERSION__ declaration
details: Create `web/src/vite-env.d.ts` with `/// <reference types="vite/client" />`.
Add `declare const __APP_VERSION__: string;` as an ambient declaration.
Verify `tsc --noEmit` resolves `__APP_VERSION__` in any `src/` file without error.

subtasks.title: Create src/main.tsx mounting App into #root
details: Create `web/src/main.tsx` importing React 18's `createRoot` from `react-dom/client`.
Import `./globals.css` to apply global Tailwind styles and shadcn/ui CSS variables.
Mount `<App />` into `document.getElementById('root')` using `createRoot(...).render(...)`.
Use non-null assertion or guard for the root element to satisfy `noUncheckedIndexedAccess`.

subtasks.title: Create src/App.tsx with React Router and QueryClientProvider
details: Create `web/src/App.tsx` importing `QueryClient` and `QueryClientProvider` from `@tanstack/react-query`.
Set up React Router using `BrowserRouter` (or `createBrowserRouter` + `RouterProvider`).
Register the index route at `path='/'` rendering `src/routes/index.tsx`.
Register the catch-all route at `path='*'` rendering `src/routes/not-found.tsx`.
Wrap the router with `<QueryClientProvider client={queryClient}>` where `queryClient = new QueryClient()`.
Export `App` as the default export.

checks: TS-06-9 passes: `web/index.html` exists at project root, contains `src/main.tsx` and `type="module"`.
TS-06-18 passes: `vite-env.d.ts` contains `declare const __APP_VERSION__: string`.
TS-06-8 passes: `src/main.tsx` contains `createRoot`, `root`, and `App`.
TS-06-31 passes: `src/main.tsx` imports `globals.css`.
TS-06-46 passes: `src/App.tsx` configures React Router with `/` route.
TS-06-47 passes: `src/App.tsx` uses `QueryClientProvider` and `QueryClient`.
TS-06-48 passes: `src/App.tsx` contains wildcard `path="*"` catch-all route.
`tsc --noEmit` exits 0 after adding these files.

task_groups.title: Create hello-world route, 404 route, and Makefile targets

subtasks.title: Create src/routes/index.tsx hello-world route component

` or `` element.

Include a React Router `<Link to="/">` (or `<a href="/">`) navigating back to the home page.
Export the component as the default export.

Add `web-build` target with recipe: `cd web && npm run build`.
Add `web-lint` target with recipe: `cd web && npm run lint`.

details: Assert all 11 required top-level files exist under `web/`.

task_groups.title: Checkpoint: full lint and build validation

subtasks.title: Run npm run lint and confirm zero errors
details: Run `npm run lint` from `web/` — this runs `eslint . && tsc --noEmit`.
Assert exit code 0 with no error output.
Verify individually: `eslint .` exits 0 and `tsc --noEmit` exits 0.
Fix any lint or type errors before proceeding.

subtasks.title: Run npm run build and verify web/dist/ output
details: Run `npm run build` from `web/` and assert exit code 0.

subtasks.title: Validate path alias consistency between tsconfig and vite.config
details: Confirm `tsconfig.json` `paths['@/*']` and `vite.config.ts` `resolve.alias['@']` both map to `src/`.
Confirm `tsc --noEmit` and `npm run build` both exit 0 (alias resolves in both tools).
Confirm all shadcn/ui imports in `src/routes/index.tsx` use `@/` alias, not relative paths.

subtasks.title: Verify npm ci produces reproducible install from package-lock.json
details: Remove `web/node_modules/` and run `npm ci` from `web/`.
Assert `npm ci` exits 0 and `node_modules/` is restored.
Run `npm run build` after `npm ci` and assert exit 0 with `web/dist/` produced.

checks: TS-06-P1 passes: `npm run lint` exits 0 — zero ESLint errors and zero TypeScript type errors.
TS-06-P2 passes: `@/` alias resolves consistently in both `tsc --noEmit` and `npm run build`.
TS-06-P5 passes: `npm ci && npm run build` succeeds on a clean environment.
`make web-lint` exits 0.
`make web-build` exits 0 with non-empty `web/dist/`.
All TS-06-E* edge case tests pass (file content assertions).

subtasks.title: Trace execution paths — verify no stubs remain in the scaffold
details: Audit all scaffold source files for stub markers: `throw new Error('not implemented')`, `TODO`, `FIXME`, or empty component bodies.
Verify PATH-1: `main.tsx` → `App` → `QueryClientProvider` → `BrowserRouter` → index route renders without runtime errors.
Verify PATH-4: navigating to `/nonexistent-page` triggers the wildcard `path='*'` route and renders `not-found.tsx`.
Confirm each file in the call chain has a real implementation (not a placeholder returning null unexpectedly).

subtasks.title: Verify return value and prop propagation through the component tree
details: Confirm `__APP_VERSION__` is read from the Vite `define` injection and rendered in the DOM (not hardcoded).
Confirm `QueryClientProvider` receives `client={queryClient}` where `queryClient` is a `new QueryClient()` instance.
Confirm `<Button>` in index route receives and renders its label prop correctly.
Confirm React Router `Link` in not-found page correctly navigates to `/` (client-side, no full reload).

subtasks.title: Run smoke tests TS-06-SMOKE-1 through TS-06-SMOKE-3
details: SMOKE-1: run `make web-dev`, wait for port 5173, navigate to `http://localhost:5173/` — assert heading `af-hub`, version string, and styled Button are present.
SMOKE-2: run `make web-build`, assert exit 0 and `web/dist/` contains HTML, JS bundle, and CSS file.
SMOKE-3: run `make web-lint`, assert exit 0 with zero ESLint errors and zero TypeScript type errors.
Backend at port 8080 is NOT required for SMOKE-1 through SMOKE-3.

subtasks.title: Run smoke tests TS-06-SMOKE-4 and TS-06-SMOKE-5
details: SMOKE-4: with dev server on 5173, navigate to `/nonexistent-page` — assert 404 message and link to `/`; clicking link navigates to hello-world without page reload.

SMOKE-5: start a mock HTTP server on port 8080 recording incoming paths; make GET to `http://localhost:5173/api/example`; assert mock received path `/api/example` unchanged and `Host` header is `localhost:8080`.
Verify TS-06-P3 (proxy verbatim forwarding): no path segments stripped or rewritten.

subtasks.title: Cross-spec entry point verification and dead-code audit
details: Verify proxy paths `/healthz` and `/readyz` (owned by `server_foundation` spec) are referenced in `vite.config.ts` proxy config without any rewrite rules.
Run `npm run dev` with no backend on port 8080 — assert dev server starts and binds to port 5173 (TS-06-37); proxy fails silently as expected.
TS-06-P4: run `npx shadcn-ui add input` (or another component) in `web/` — assert it succeeds without re-init prompt, validating `components.json` consistency.
Final dead-code audit: `grep -r 'throw new Error' web/src/` returns no results in implementation files; no empty component bodies.

checks: TS-06-SMOKE-1 passes: dev server starts, hello-world page renders with `af-hub` heading, version, and Button.
TS-06-SMOKE-2 passes: `make web-build` exits 0, `web/dist/` contains built assets.
TS-06-SMOKE-3 passes: `make web-lint` exits 0 with zero errors from ESLint and tsc.
TS-06-SMOKE-4 passes: 404 page renders for unmatched path, link back to `/` works.
TS-06-SMOKE-5 passes: proxy forwards `/api/example` verbatim to port 8080.
TS-06-P1 passes: `npm run lint` exits 0 on committed scaffold.
TS-06-P2 passes: `@/` alias consistent in tsconfig and vite.config.
